benefits.description: A/B tested fasted vs. non-fasted dosing of tesa/ipa; consistently got better IGF-1 response when taken with a meal rather than fasted

protocol_notes: Reports on a friend's extended A/B testing (close to a year) of fasted vs. fed dosing of tesamorelin/ipamorelin. Friend repeatedly cycled between fasted and non-fasted conditions while measuring IGF-1. Non-fasted consistently yielded better IGF-1 response. Also argues GHRP peptides like ipamorelin can support bulking via appetite increase at higher doses, and can counteract appetite suppression from retatrutide.
